headline: CrowdStrike Partnerships And AI Products Deepen Falcon Platform Consolidation Story
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) has rolled out a series of AI-focused product launches, including Falcon Data Security, Agentic MDR, and the Charlotte AI AgentWorks Ecosystem. The company has expanded its collaborations with IBM, Intel, and HCLTech to tighten integration between its Falcon platform, partner AI tools, and hardware. These moves deepen CrowdStrike's approach to AI driven cybersecurity, with new features such as adversary informed cloud protection, agentic SOAR, and no code...
